posts.author: eranggg (eran)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone,

For a property management company - how to create the next quarterly report?

I have a board for:
Assets
Faults
Clients

Every quarter I want to send the client a report with the income for his assets (the income for each asset is recorded on the Assets board and a client can have multiple assets)
The expenses for each asset (the expense for each asset is recorded on the Assets board) + the expenses for the faults in the quarter (there is a board for Faults).

Then I want to show the client the total income minus the total expenses.

Additionally, I want automation that will send the client the quarterly report every quarter.

How can I do this?

As I understand it, I need to prepare a dashboard for each client and if I have a lot of clients it’s a hassle.
I would be happy to hear if there is a more efficient way to build the report.
Thanks in advance!

posts.author: sachinkarma (sachin kumar karma)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @eranggg

For your quarterly report automation, the best approach is to use Monday.com Google Sheets and Make.com/Zapier for seamless integration. Instead of creating individual dashboards for each client, a more scalable solution is to have a centralized reporting system that dynamically pulls data for each client and generates a personalized report.

Google Sheets as a Data Hub Sync your Assets Faults and Expenses boards to Google Sheets automatically using Monday.com integrations.
Automated Report Generation Use Google Sheets formulas or Google Apps Script to calculate total income, expenses, and net profit per client.
PDF Report Creation & Email Automation Convert the report into a PDF using tools like PDF.co or Google Docs API then automate email dispatch every quarter with Make.com/Zapier

Let’s Connect to Call

posts.author: eranggg (eran)
posts.cookedHtml: Are you sure I cant achieve this report with any app on the marketplace?

posts.author: sachinkarma (sachin kumar karma)
posts.cookedHtml: if your requirements involve complex data manipulation, automation, or integrations across multiple platforms, you may need custom automation using Make.com, Zapier, or Google Apps Script to pull and structure the data as needed.

posts.author: sl1nna (Sami Linnanvuo)
posts.cookedHtml:
eran:

Are you sure I cant achieve this report with any app on the marketplace?

@eranggg I suggest taking a look at the Analytics & Reports by Screenful. With it, you can create reports across multiple boards and schedule them to be sent at via email or Slack.

posts.author: eranggg (eran)
posts.cookedHtml: I cant create this report with this tool.

posts.author: sl1nna (Sami Linnanvuo)
posts.cookedHtml: @eranggg have you tried it? You can contact us at support@screenful.com for guidance.

posts.author: Iryna_Belaya (Iryna Belaya)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @eranggg ,

What you ask is possible to implement with Smart Spreadsheet. You just need to dedicate a sheet for calculations you want to share with a client and use the scheduled report feature to send them reports automatically.

I’ve recently described a similar use case here. I hope it will be helpful!
